LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL UNDER CCP SECTION 664.6 & ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN IN THE MOVING PAPERS. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS AND WILL ENTER THE JUDGMENT LODGED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS AFTER DEFENDANT VANESSA C. SOLANO'S TIME TO OBJECT HAS RUN. Off Calendar May-18-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 664.6 & ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion to vacate dismissal and enter judgment is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. The court will sign the proposed order submitted with the moving papers and will enter the judgment lodged with the moving papers after defendant Vanessa C. Solano's time to object has run. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
